metadata.description: Session wrap-up (2026-04-12): consolidate state for a fresh next session. Captures cluster→topic replacement, Figure 2 redesign, Figure 1 variants, and confirmed LLM validation.

summary:
WHAT WAS ACCOMPLISHED (2026-04-11 and 2026-04-12 sessions combined):

Content-finalization pass for Nature Collection / PALCOMMS submission (deadline April 30, 2026). All changes captured in HANDOFF_NEXT_SESSION.md at the repo root.

Key deliverables:
1. Approach F LLM validation on full 750 public probes (GPT-5.4-mini + Claude Opus 4.6): multi-label recall 0.742 / 0.733 on 4 clean themes, Cohen's κ = 0.795, compensation 27/150 confirmed. Supplementary validation section rewritten. Main manuscript methods paragraph updated. McHugh 2012 reference added.
2. Abstract rewrite (237 words): narrative-driven, "low-pass filter" metaphor, no colons/semicolons/citations/em dashes, coalitions-mobilize close.
3. Cluster → Topic terminology change across all user-facing text (manuscript, supplementary, cover letter). 34 C-prefix → T-prefix changes per manuscript. Source code intentionally not renamed.
4. Figure 2 redesigned with side-by-side percentage bars, T-prefix labels. Fixed data bug (T3 showed 0 artist probes; actually 8).
5. Figure 1: 5 variants generated (A-E); canonical choice pending user decision.
6. Figure 3, S3, S4 regenerated from canonical data (fixed stale values).
7. Reference fixes: 16 polish updates applied (Mordvintsev date, Cheung "Epub ahead of print", Banks & Li DOI, Wald expanded et al., diacritics restored for Vásárhelyi/Małecki/Möck/Hänggli, Pane Spanish title, Ramesh PMLR URL, Rombach pages+DOI, Goodfellow pages, Jiang pages, McHugh 2012 added, AOI Coalition → Creative Rights in AI Coalition).
8. PALCOMMS compliance: title sentence case, data availability standard wording, competing financial interests heading, cover letter validation stats updated.
9. Context PDFs for Ariya: Briefing (7pp, 887KB) and Pipeline Diagram (3pp, 401KB) rendered via Playwright.
10. All 7 .docx files regenerated, 191/191 tests passing.

WHAT IS NEXT (for the next session):

IMMEDIATE (content-relevant, pending user decision):
- Figure 1 variant selection: 5 candidates at figures/manuscript/ (variants A-E). Current canonical figure_1_semantic_density.png is still the submission figure until user promotes one of the variants.
- Ariya review of the content-finalized package (files listed in HANDOFF_NEXT_SESSION.md). User is uploading to Google Drive.

PRE-SUBMISSION (format-only, do last):
- Figure format conversion PNG/PDF → EPS/TIFF (PALCOMMS accepts only these) — BLOCKER.
- UK English spelling pass (marginalization → marginalisation etc.).
- Anonymize the repository URL in the anonymous version (github.com/AriyaMG1/... → placeholder).
- Compile SI into single PDF ≤10 MB with title + author list on page 1.
- Reorder metadata sections: Data availability must come AFTER References per PALCOMMS.
- Add "no prior editorial board discussion" line to cover letter.
- Manual verification of Bøgh 2025 thesis URL (DiVA portal timed out twice).
- README.md cluster → topic pass (not yet audited).

FLAGGED FOR USER REVIEW:
- "100,000 visual artists" claim rewritten to "40+ creative industry organizations" in Discussion § Coalition Mobilization. User should confirm this wording is acceptable or supply a specific source for the 100k figure.

KEY FILES FOR NEXT SESSION:
- HANDOFF_NEXT_SESSION.md — complete state, read first
- figures/final_pipeline/all_metrics.csv + h3_table.csv — canonical numbers
- figures/final_pipeline/approach_f_*.csv — LLM validation results
- jan_2026_manuscript/NatureCollection2026/ — primary submission directory
- CLAUDE.md — project conventions (no em dashes, no AI filler, publication-grade)

contribution.description: Redesigned Figure 2 as side-by-side percentage bars (blue = public discourse %, red = artist probe %) sorted by artist % descending. Added "T" prefix labels with full topic names. Fixed data bug where T3 showed 0 artist probes (actually has 8). New script: scripts/regenerate_figure_2.py. Written to all three output dirs.

Generated 5 Figure 1 variants (topics-only, topics+artist-density, hulls+source, topics+dual-density, centroids-minimalist) at figures/manuscript/. Decision pending on which variant to promote as canonical Figure 1. Current canonical figure_1_semantic_density.png unchanged.

Systematic cluster→topic replacement across all user-facing text. 34 C-prefix→T-prefix per manuscript (C13→T13 etc.), 83 cluster→topic noun replacements per manuscript, 33 per supplementary, 10 in cover letter. Preserved verb forms clustering/clustered. Zero stale "cluster" nouns remain. Source code (src/cluster_quality.py, variable names) intentionally not changed.

Updated HANDOFF_NEXT_SESSION.md with complete 2026-04-12 state: Approach F LLM validation results, cluster→topic terminology change, Figure 2 redesign, Figure 1 variants pending decision, full canonical numbers including Cohen's κ=0.795 and compensation 27/150 confirmed. Updated memory/project_handoff_pointer.md to reflect new handoff contents. Future sessions should read HANDOFF_NEXT_SESSION.md first.
